name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement giving a customer time-limited access to a product for evaluation purposes during a pilot period.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.help: The date the agreement takes effect.

fields.label: Product
fields.help: Description of the product being evaluated during the pilot.

fields.label: Pilot Period
fields.help: The duration or specific date range of the pilot (e.g. 90 days from the Effective Date, or Jan 1 – Mar 31 2026).

fields.label: Evaluation Purposes
fields.help: How Customer may use the Product during the pilot. Leave blank to use the standard definition: internal use solely to test and evaluate the Product to determine whether to enter into a Definitive Agreement.
fields.default: The internal use of the Product solely to test and evaluate the Product to determine whether to enter into a Definitive Agreement with Provider.

fields.label: Fees
fields.help: Any fees payable by Customer during the pilot, if applicable. Leave blank if the pilot is free of charge.

fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.help: Maximum total cumulative liability either party may face under this agreement (Section 5.1).

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.help: The U.S. state (or other jurisdiction) whose law governs this agreement (e.g. Delaware).

fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.help: The courts where disputes will be brought (e.g. state and federal courts located in San Francisco, California).

fields.label: Modifications
fields.help: Any modifications to the Standard Terms (optional).
